chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 108 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on statement filed by Counsel for the Petitioner for not pressing. 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For hearing of CMA No.420/2021 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 29-09-2025 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>><<<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioners, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
